info.title: BeeEye Platform API
info.description: AI decision-intelligence platform for ADMC. Read-only analytics in the initial implementation. All bounded contexts are mounted under /api/v1.

get.summary: List all mounted bounded-context modules
The caller's own identity, roles and permissions
Organisation module information
Master Data module information
Data Integration module information
Data Quality module information
Data Health: governed sources, data-quality score and issues (V3-GOV-008)
Sales Actuals module information
Rotation mix, decay alerts and dead-stock counts
Server-side paged configuration demand grid
Configurations with material demand decay
Full demand insight (incl. regional breakdown) for one configuration
Forecasting module information
Back-test comparison, chosen model and future forecast with confidence intervals
Where forecasts consistently over- or under-perform, by product / region
Available filter dimension values and month range
Inventory module information
Portfolio KPIs and risk / aging distributions
Server-side paged, filtered and sorted inventory grid
Full risk breakdown, factors and recommendation for one unit
Available filter dimension values
Procurement module information
Procurement quantity ranges and safety stock for a scenario
Fleet-level service-intensity KPIs with coverage and synthetic-data provenance
Per-model service-intensity index (paged, sortable)
Mileage-band, time-since-sale and service-type breakdowns for one model
Portfolio KPIs: parts, predicted demand, low-data and at-risk counts, demand-class mix
Per-part demand, recommended stocking range, risk and low-data flag (paged, sortable, filterable)
Usage history, method comparison (Croston/SBA/TSB), forecast range, supersession & compatibility
Models and Experiments module information
Lineage: source-to-decision pipeline and per-metric provenance (V3-GOV-009)
Predictions module information
Why the platform says what it says about one subject

post.summary: Record whether an explanation was useful. Recorded only; it retrains nothing

get.summary: Recommendations module information
Recommended order quantities by configuration for a scenario
Recorded recommendations, newest and highest-priority first

post.summary: Run the ruleset and persist any recommendation not already recorded

get.summary: The governed decision log — every recommendation, with the human decision on it
What the system recommended, beside what the human decided

post.summary: Claim a recommendation for review, opening a decision on it
Accept the recommendation exactly as the engine wrote it
Accept with a change, stored as a delta beside the untouched original
Decline the recommendation. A reason is mandatory and is retained
Sign off one step of the approval chain. A decision needs a second person
Confirm a human executed the action downstream. BeeEye never writes to Oracle Fusion
Record the realised effect, closing the learning loop

get.summary: Executive Insights module information
Ranked cross-module decisions needing attention, with headline aggregates
Notifications module information
Audit module information
Platform Administration module information
The platform's current risk configuration, read-only (V3-GOV-010)
